results.rendered_html:
ajasra a. [na jas-ra  P. III. 2. 167 ; jasirnañpūrvaḥ kriyāsātatye vartate  Sk. ] Not ceasing, constant, perpetual; ˚dīkṣāprayatasya  R. 3. 44. 
— sraṃ ind. Ever, constantly, perpetually; vṛthaiva saṃkalpaśatairajasraṃ  Ś. 3. 5 ; tacca dhūnotyajasraṃ  U. 4. 26.
